name: Sloppy Franks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave onion, green pepper, and margarine in a 1-quart casserole on high (100%) until vegetables are tender, about 3 to 4 minutes.
2. Stir in barbecue sauce, catsup, and franks. Cover and microwave on high (100%), about 2 1/2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Cover and microwave until the mixture boils, for 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Spoon the mixture onto buns on a serving plate.
5. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) until buns are hot, for 1 to 2 minutes.
